pdf_relative_path: processed/S4620_EN_Col17 Pricing in SAP S4HANA Sales.pdf

questions.question: You can limit a pricing agreement to a certain period.
questions.answer_explanation: You can limit a pricing agreement to a certain period.

questions.question: What is controlled by the condition type?
questions.answer_explanation: Calculation type is controlled by condition type.

questions.question: The header conditions are distributed manually among the items based on the net value.
questions.answer_explanation: The header conditions are automatically distributed among the items based on the net value.

questions.question: A condition table is a combination of fields that form the key for a condition record.
questions.answer_explanation: A condition table is a combination of fields that form the key for a condition record.

questions.question: Which of the following provides a method to modify the standard pricing logic to meet unique user requirements?
questions.answer_explanation: Requirement routines and formulas provide a method for modifying the standard pricing logic to meet unique user requirements.

questions.question: An access sequence only consists of one condition table.
questions.answer_explanation: An access sequence can have more than one condition table.

questions.question: Which of the following elements contains keys that are used to create dependent condition records?
questions.answer_explanation: A condition table contains keys used to create dependent condition records. Unit 2:

questions.question: New fields can be added to the pricing field catalog.
questions.answer_explanation: New fields can be added to the pricing field catalog. This allows you to use the new field to define condition tables.

questions.question: What can you do for or with a condition record?

options.A: You can define a pricing procedure.
options.B: You can define a release procedure.
options.C: You can copy condition records from one customer to another.
options.D: You copy condition records with the help of the button: Update pricing .

questions.answer_explanation: With a condition record, you can define a release procedure and copy condition records from one customer to another.

questions.question: You can create new pricing condition records today for next year.
questions.answer_explanation: You can create new pricing condition records today for next year.

questions.question: What options do you have for the condition record maintenance besides the condition type based maintenance (transaction code VK11, VK12, VK13) ?

options.A: You can create condition records with a condition formula to meet user-specific requirements.
options.B: You can only maintain condition records which are configured as condition determined manually in the pricing procedure.
options.C: You can create your own price lists for maintenance of condition records.
options.D: You can maintain condition records with manage-price sales app.

questions.answer_explanation: You can maintain condition records based on your own price lists and you can use the manage-price sales app. Unit 3:

questions.question: You can export and import condition record with the help of the manage-price sales app?
questions.answer_explanation: You can export and import condition record with the help of the manage-price sales app.

questions.question: For group conditions, the item quantities are always accumulated to determine scale values.
questions.answer_explanation: Group conditions can be based on different things, such as gross weight or quantities. It depends on the setup of the condition type.

questions.question: When values are accumulated in condition records, you can set only a minimum condition value.
questions.answer_explanation: When values are accumulated in condition records, you can set a maximum condition value, condition base value, or number of orders for a condition.

questions.question: Multiple conditions cannot be grouped in a condition supplement procedure.
questions.answer_explanation: Several conditions can be grouped in a condition supplement procedure.

questions.question: Which of the following condition types are group conditions and are divided among all the items in an order according to value?
questions.answer_explanation: Condition types AMIW and HM00 are group conditions and are divided among all the items in an order according to value.

questions.question: In customer hierarchies, you can assign price or rebate agreements only to a low-level node.
questions.answer_explanation: In customer hierarchies, you can assign price or rebate agreements to a high- level node.

questions.question: A pallet discount like (KP00) offers a discount for whole units of measure only. This behavior is controlled by a basic formula in the pricing procedure.
questions.answer_explanation: The pallet discount like (KP00) offers a discount for whole units of measure only. This behavior is controlled by a basic formula in the pricing procedure. Unit 5:

questions.question: Which condition types are statistical?
questions.answer_explanation: VPRS (Cost price) and SKTO (Cash Discount) are the condition types that are statistical.

questions.question: Which of the following factors are considered when determining tax rates?

options.A: The tax liability of the ship-to party
options.B: The tax liability of the material
options.D: The business transaction ­ domestic or export and import

questions.answer_explanation: The factors that are considered in determining tax rates are the business transactions (domestic, export, or import), the tax liability of the ship-to party, and the tax liability of the material.

questions.question: The tax procedure is assigned according to country in the basic settings of the Financial Accounting (FI) component.
questions.answer_explanation: The tax procedure is assigned according to a country in the basic settings of the Financial Accounting (FI) component. For example, for the United States, you have the following tax procedures: TAXUS, TAXUSJ, and TAXUSX.

questions.question: Which document displays the sales deal and promotion information?
questions.answer_explanation: The detail screen of a billing item displays the sales deal number and promotion number fields

questions.unit: Unit 7: Introduction to Condition Contract Management
questions.question: Condition contract settlements are basically customer-based settlements such as sales- related rebates.
questions.answer_explanation: Condition Contract Settlement can be supplier-based such as purchase-related rebates or customer-based settlements such as sales-related rebates.

questions.unit: Unit 7: Introduction to Condition Contract Management
questions.question: Which of the following step is performed in the configuration of condition contract management?

options.A: Defining pricing conditions relevant for the calculation of the settlement amount
options.B: Defining dependencies to meet customer requirements
options.C: Determining how pricing procedure is linked to condition types
options.D: Creating targeted conditions over a specified range of material numbers

questions.answer_explanation: The configuration of condition contract management comprises three main steps: Configuring pricing including condition contract conditions, configuring condition contract maintenance and configuring condition contract settlement. Unit 7:

questions.unit: Unit 7: Introduction to Condition Contract Management
questions.question: In which order should the specified steps be executed when configuring pricing including condition contract conditions? Arrange these steps into the correct sequence. 0 Specify contract condition relevant for condition types 0 Define pricing procedures 0 Check condition tables 0 Assign condition type to condition type group
questions.answer_explanation: The order in which the specified steps can be executed when configuring pricing including condition contract conditions is : Check condition tables, Specify contract condition relevant for condition types, Assign condition type to condition type group, Define pricing procedures .

questions.unit: Unit 7: Introduction to Condition Contract Management
questions.question: Subsequent corrections can alter the business volume base of a time interval for which there is already a final settlement. So, a delta accruals settlement is used to settle the subsequent changes and to correct the final settlement.
questions.answer_explanation: Subsequent corrections can alter the business volume base of a time interval for which there is already a final settlement. So, a delta settlement can be used to settle the subsequent changes and to correct the final settlement.

questions.unit: Unit 7: Introduction to Condition Contract Management
questions.question: The settlement reports can start periodically, can run for one or more business partners, and can settle one or more condition contracts.
questions.answer_explanation: The settlement reports can start periodically, can run for one or more business partners, and can settle one or more condition contracts.

questions.question: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales - Replicate is a synchronous inbound service that enables you to update and delete condition records for pricing that are used in Sales.
questions.answer_explanation: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales - Replicate is an asynchronous outbound service that enables you to replicate condition records for pricing that are used in Sales to external systems
